subtopics.label: Coast Guard Great Lakes Rescue Operations
subtopics.summary: This cluster discusses specific instances of the US Coast Guard conducting rescue operations across the Great Lakes. Posts highlight varied emergency situations, such as four girls rescued from Lake Superior after being stranded without paddles [3lwqyhaetwm2p], twenty people saved from an ice floe on Lake Erie [3kjlwsjgwic2y], and three individuals rescued after a boat capsized, also on Lake Erie [3mmaok4kiua2s]. The discourse centers on the Coast Guard's crucial role in responding to these water-based emergencies.

key_quotes.quote: Coast Guard rescues 4 girls stranded without paddles on Lake Superior
key_quotes.note: This quote directly illustrates a specific type of rescue operation conducted by the Coast Guard, involving stranded boaters.

key_quotes.quote: Twenty people rescued from ice floe in Lake Erie, says US Coast Guard
key_quotes.note: This highlights a hazardous situation unique to winter conditions on the Great Lakes, showcasing a larger-scale rescue operation.

key_quotes.quote: Coast Guard rescues three people after boat capsizes on Lake Erie
key_quotes.note: This quote exemplifies a common boating emergency where the Coast Guard provides vital assistance to those in distress.

subtopics.label: Small Plane Crash and Rescue in Lake Michigan
subtopics.attitude: Informational / Factual reporting of incident and rescue
subtopics.summary: This cluster discusses a small plane crash into Lake Michigan off the coast of Wisconsin [3lylowz65ii2x, 3lylu7333ym2p]. Specifically, the incident occurred offshore from Racine, Wisconsin, approximately 12 miles out [3lylj6xwoax2n]. All three individuals involved in the crash were successfully rescued [3lylowz65ii2x, 3lylu7333ym2p].

key_quotes.quote: 3 rescued after small plane crashes into Lake Michigan off WI coast
key_quotes.note: This quote effectively summarizes the core event: a plane crash, a rescue, and the general location.

key_quotes.quote: Small plane crashes into Lake Michigan offshore from Racine, Wisconsin
key_quotes.note: This quote provides specific geographical details, identifying the precise location of the incident.

key_quotes.quote: A small plane crashed into Lake Michigan 12 miles offshore
key_quotes.note: This quote offers a more granular detail regarding the distance from the shore where the crash took place.
